name: Blue Buffalo Wilderness Trail Treats Grain-Free Salmon Biscuits Dog Treats
description: Give your wild buddy the thrill of a salmon run with Blue Buffalo Wilderness Trail Treats High Protein Grain Free Crunchy Dog Treats Biscuits, Salmon Recipe. These fine and fishy treats are stocked to the surface with protein-rich salmon and pack a satisfying crunch your dog will love. They’ve got a grain-free recipe and a tooth-healthy bite, with vitamins and fatty acids for a healthy boost. Feed them on the trail, in the dog park or even on the couch!
